score_definitions.strategy_pick_k: take first K distinct emitted main numbers by bet_index then prediction order
score_definitions.combination_budget: equal requested main-number budget; each strategy contributes quota 1 or 2
score_definitions.any_main_hit: selected main-number set intersects actual main numbers

prize_signal_by_lottery.BIG_LOTTO: main_hits >= 3 OR (main_hits >= 2 AND actual_special IN selected_numbers)

score_definitions.baseline: analytic random baseline for same selected main-number count and second-zone candidate count

disclaimer_zh: 歷史回放統計只描述既有 replay 的過去表現；不代表未來中獎率，不提供投注建議，也不代表策略可直接上線。
